name: Bureaucratrix Prim, the Permanent Undersecretary
text:
When Bureaucratrix Prim enters the battlefield, file Form 27-B: each opponent must either discard a card or skip their next untap step. They choose, then sign here, here, and initial there.
Whenever an opponent rolls one or more dice or flips one or more coins, that player pays a processing tax of {1} or you draw a card. There is, naturally, a fee for not paying the fee.
{1}{W}{U}, {T}: Audit target die roll or coin flip from this turn. Reroll it or reflip it, then YOU choose which result stands. The original result is filed under "appealed, denied."
flavorText: Three mayors have come and gone. Prim has not so much as cleaned out her desk.
